title: rubus blepharoneurus
intro: Rubus blepharoneurus, also known as the Japanese raspberry or Japanese wild raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rubus blepharoneurus include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and support immune function. Rubus blepharoneurus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
